description: Public assets required by @elizaos/app-companion at runtime. Consuming apps must serve these from their public/ root.

vrm-decoders/draco/.note: Draco WASM decompressor for glTF/VRM geometry. Shipped with the plugin.

animations/idle.glb.gz.note: Default idle animation loaded on engine init.

animations/greetings/.note: Greeting animations (FBX). Used in companion mode.

animations/mixamo/.note: Mixamo base animations (FBX). Retargeted to VRM at runtime.

vrms/.note: Bundled VRM avatar models (.vrm.gz). Roster configured via boot config.

vrms/previews/.note: PNG thumbnail previews for avatar selector.
